name: Society of Women Engineers
description: Empowering women to pursue careers in engineering.

name: Computer Science Society
description: A community for students passionate about computer science, programming, and technology. Join us for hackathons, workshops, and networking events with industry professionals.

name: Ethics in Technology Club
description: Exploring the intersection of technology and ethics. We discuss AI ethics, data privacy, digital rights, and the social impact of emerging technologies.

name: Biomedical Engineering Society
description: Bringing together students interested in biomedical engineering, healthcare innovation, and medical device development. Hands-on projects and guest speakers from the industry.

name: Women in Business
description: Empowering women to succeed in business through mentorship, professional development, and networking opportunities with successful female executives.

name: Data Science Club
description: Learn data analysis, machine learning, and statistical modeling. Work on real-world projects and compete in data science competitions.

name: Philosophy & Ethics Society
description: Engage in thoughtful discussions about moral philosophy, ethics, and the big questions of human existence. Weekly seminars and debates.

name: Robotics Club
description: Build, program, and compete with robots! Perfect for students interested in mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, and computer science.

name: Women in STEM
description: Supporting and celebrating women in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics through community building, mentorship, and advocacy.

name: Environmental Ethics Alliance
description: Addressing environmental challenges through an ethical lens. Discuss sustainability, climate justice, and our responsibilities to future generations.

name: Mathematics Society
description: For math enthusiasts! Explore advanced topics, participate in math competitions, and attend talks by renowned mathematicians.

name: Women Leaders Forum
description: Developing the next generation of women leaders through workshops, speaker series, and leadership training programs.
